Title: Research snapshot
Description: Collect the initial spine papers and confirm scope constraints
Acceptance: Snapshot covers scope and identifies 10-20 seed papers
Notes: Duplicate/split/insert rows as needed; add new IDs when scope grows; re-validate

Title: Literature enrichment gate
Description: Populate ref.bib with 50-80 candidates; screen to >=30 verified (>=5 per subsection); ensure seminal anchors
Acceptance: ref.bib passes enrichment gate; coverage meets subsection targets
Notes: Use arXiv registry export-bibtex; avoid unverified non-arXiv sources

Title: Benchmark+metrics map
Description: Create a benchmark/metric checklist for PEFT comparisons (LLM+vision+multimodal)
Acceptance: Checklist ready and referenced by Evaluation section
Notes: Prefer benchmarks with established usage and clear protocols

Title: Introduction
Description: Motivation + scope + contributions + roadmap with citations
Acceptance: Section drafted with citations; claims are scoped and dated (as-of 2026-03-17)
Notes: Algorithm emphasis; include multimodal scope note

Title: Definitions and efficiency metrics
Description: Define PEFT vs full FT/ICL; formalize efficiency metrics + reporting checklist
Acceptance: Section drafted with citations and clear comparability guidance

Title: Taxonomy of PEFT methods
Description: Survey method families with representative citations per family
Acceptance: Taxonomy complete; each named method has a verified citation
Notes: Cover adapters/side-tuning; LoRA-family; prompt/prefix; selective tuning; sparsity

Title: Design space + composition
Acceptance: Section drafted with citations and actionable design guidelines

Title: Systems view + quantized PEFT
Section_Path: Systems View: Training and Serving Efficiency
Description: Training memory breakdown; quantized finetuning; serving & hot-swapping; toolchains
Acceptance: Section drafted with citations and practical constraints
Notes: Include LLM + vision multimodal system differences

Title: Evaluation and benchmarks
Description: Benchmarks+metrics; reporting checklist; reproducibility; failure modes
Acceptance: Section drafted; includes benchmark map and cost metrics with citations

Title: Applications + multimodal
Description: LLM instruction tuning; domain specialization; vision-language/multimodal PEFT case studies
Acceptance: Section drafted with citations across domains and modalities

Title: Safety + governance + provenance
Description: Safety/fairness risks of cheap adaptation; privacy; provenance for adapter sharing
Acceptance: Section drafted with evidence-backed claims and citations
Notes: Keep claims conservative; separate evidence from open questions

Title: Open challenges + conclusion
Description: Synthesize open problems; conclude with takeaways (no new claims)
Acceptance: Section drafted; conclusion is concise and citation-consistent
Notes: Use dated language for fast-moving areas

Title: Rhythm refinement
Description: Apply latex-rhythm-refiner skill section-by-section after all W issues DONE
Acceptance: All sections refined and citations preserved
Notes: Run only after all writing issues are DONE

Title: Citation and policy audit
Description: Verify citations source policy and compilation status
Acceptance: All checks pass and outstanding issues are documented

Title: Compile + warnings
Acceptance: compile_paper.py passes with no critical warnings
Notes: Set Status back to TODO if compilation fails

Title: Final package + page count
Description: Report main-text page count; ensure figures/tables render; final smoke compile
Acceptance: Main text 6-10 pages; PDF ready for arXiv upload
